backend_address_ip_configuration_id.description: The ID of the IP configuration associated with the backend address.

backend_address_pool_id.description: The ID of the backend address pool to associate with the load balancer.

ip_address.description: The IP address to include in the backend address pool.

name.description: The name of the backend address.

virtual_network_id.description: The ID of the virtual network where the backend address resides.
